meanings.meaning_en: the fourth month of the year, between March and May
meanings.example: The changes will be introduced in April.
meanings.example_cn: 这些变更将于4月实施。

meanings.meaning_en: the eighth month of the year, between July and September
meanings.example: The world premiere took place in August 1956.
meanings.example_cn: 全球首映是在1956年8月。

meanings.meaning_en: the 12th month of the year, between November and January
meanings.example: Last December they visited Prague.
meanings.example_cn: 去年12月他们去了布拉格。

meanings.example: But to do it, Europe should develop its own unified Asia policy, set its own priorities, and learn to have one voice on the euro and European defense strategy.
meanings.example_cn: 但是想做到的话，欧洲必须制定其统一的亚洲政策，选择它的优先事务，并学会在欧元和欧洲防御战略上保持统一的声音。

meanings.meaning_en: the second month of the year, between January and March
meanings.example: He joined the Army in February 1943.
meanings.example_cn: 他1943年2月参军。

meanings.meaning_en: the day between Thursday and Saturday
meanings.example: Diane won’t be here Friday.
meanings.example_cn: 星期五黛安娜不来这里。

meanings.meaning_en: the first month of the year, between December and February
meanings.example: We always have snow in January.
meanings.example_cn: 我们这里1月份总会下雪。

meanings.meaning_en: the seventh month of the year, between June and August
meanings.example: Laura came over to England last July.
meanings.example_cn: 去年7月劳拉来到英格兰。

meanings.meaning_en: the sixth month of the year, between May and July
meanings.example: He spent two and a half weeks with us in June 1986.
meanings.example_cn: 1986年6月，他和我们呆了两个半星期。

meanings.meaning_en: the third month of the year, between February and April
meanings.example: She started work here last March.
meanings.example_cn: 她去年3月开始在这儿工作。

meanings.meaning_en: the day between Sunday and Tuesday
meanings.example: The president announced Monday that he would cancel the debt.
meanings.example_cn: 总统周一宣布他会取消这笔债务。

meanings.meaning_en: the 11th month of the year, between October and December
meanings.example: And again in November.
meanings.example_cn: 在十一月又一次。

meanings.meaning_en: the tenth month of the year, between September and November
meanings.example: Most seasonal hiring is done in early October.
meanings.example_cn: 多数季节性招聘是在10月初进行。

meanings.example: I made a few phone calls.
meanings.example_cn: 我打了几个电话。

meanings.meaning_en: to have the skill, strength, knowledge etc needed to do something
meanings.example: I’ve always wanted to be able to speak Japanese.
meanings.example_cn: 我一直想学会讲日语。

meanings.meaning_en: concerning or relating to a particular subject
meanings.example: a book about politics
meanings.example_cn: 一本有关政治的书

meanings.meaning_en: in a higher position than something else
meanings.example: He lived in a flat above the shop.
meanings.example_cn: 他住在那商店上面的一套房间里。

meanings.meaning_en: a situation in which someone is injured or something is damaged without anyone intending them to be
meanings.example: Ken had an accident at work and had to go to hospital.
meanings.example_cn: 肯在工作中出了事故，不得不去医院。

meanings.meaning_en: a place for someone to stay, live, or work
meanings.example: The price for the holiday includes flights and accommodation.
meanings.example_cn: 度假的价格包括机票和住宿。

meanings.meaning_en: from one side to the other side of sth
meanings.example: He walked across the field.
meanings.example_cn: 他走过田地。

meanings.meaning_en: to do something in a particular way or for a particular reason
meanings.example: The company acted correctly in sacking him.
meanings.example_cn: 公司解雇他做得对。

meanings.meaning_en: one thing that you do
meanings.example: The jury decided that Walker had acted in self-defence.
meanings.example_cn: 陪审团裁定沃克的行为属于自卫。

meanings.meaning_en: the process of doing something, especially in order to achieve a particular thing
meanings.example: The government must take action (=  do something  ) now to stop the rise in violent crime.
meanings.example_cn: 政府现在必须采取行动遏止暴力犯罪的上升。

meanings.meaning_en: things that people do, especially in order to achieve a particular aim
meanings.example: Everyone is free to engage in peaceful political activity.
meanings.example_cn: 每个人都可以自由参加和平的政治活动。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who performs in a play or film
meanings.example: His father was an actor in the Cantonese Opera Company.
meanings.example_cn: 他父亲曾是粤剧团的一名演员。

meanings.meaning_en: used to add new information to what you have just said, to give your opinion, or to start a new conversation
meanings.example: I’ve known Barbara for years. Since we were babies, actually.
meanings.example_cn: 我认识芭芭拉很多年了，实际上我们从小就认识。

meanings.meaning_en: an advertisement
meanings.example: She replied to a lonely hearts ad she spotted in the New York Times.
meanings.example_cn: 她回复了在《纽约时报》上看到的一则求友广告。

meanings.meaning_en: to put something with something else or with a group of other things
meanings.example: If the mixture seems dry, add water.
meanings.example_cn: 如果混合物看上去干，加点水。

meanings.meaning_en: the details of the place where someone lives or works, which you use to send them letters etc.
meanings.example: I can give you the address of a good attorney.
meanings.example_cn: 我可以给你一个好律师的地址。

meanings.meaning_en: a fully-grown person, or one who is considered to be legally responsible for their actions
meanings.example: Some children find it difficult to talk to adults.
meanings.example_cn: 一些孩子觉得与大人很难谈得来。

meanings.meaning_en: fully grown or developed
meanings.example: an adult lion
meanings.example_cn: 一头成年的狮子

meanings.meaning_en: very modern
meanings.example: advanced weapon systems
meanings.example_cn: 先进的武器系统

meanings.meaning_en: an exciting experience in which dangerous or unusual things happen
meanings.example: Ahab’s adventures at sea
meanings.example_cn: 亚哈的海上历险

meanings.meaning_en: to draw attention (to); refer (to)
meanings.example: Advertising slots in soaps are expensive to purchase, but guarantee large numbers of viewers seeing the advert.
meanings.example_cn: 在肥皂剧中插播广告的费用非常昂贵，但能保证大批观众看到广告。

meanings.meaning_en: an advertisement

a picture, set of words, or a short film, which is intended to persuade people to buy a product or use a service, or that gives information about a job that is available, an event that is going to happen etc
meanings.example: They put an advertisement in ‘The Morning News’, offering a high salary for the right person.
meanings.example_cn: 他们在《晨报》上刊登了一则启事，出高薪寻找合适的人选。

meanings.meaning_en: an opinion you give someone about what they should do
meanings.example: You should have followed my advice.
meanings.example_cn: 你真该听我的建议。

meanings.meaning_en: a flying vehicle with wings and at least one engine
meanings.example: The aeroplane landed us at the airport in Barcelona.
meanings.example_cn: 飞机把我们降落在巴塞罗那机场。

meanings.meaning_en: frightened because you think that you may get hurt or that something bad may happen
meanings.example: There’s no need to be afraid.
meanings.example_cn: 没有必要害怕。

meanings.meaning_en: next to and following sb/sth in order or importance
meanings.example: Your name comes after mine in the list.
meanings.example_cn: 在名单上你的名字在我的后面。

meanings.meaning_en: the part of the day after the morning and before the evening
meanings.example: There’s a meeting on Thursday afternoon .
meanings.example_cn: 星期四下午有个会议。

meanings.meaning_en: after an event or time that has already been mentioned
meanings.example: Charles arrived shortly afterwards .
meanings.example_cn: 过了不多久，查尔斯来了。

meanings.meaning_en: one more time – used when something has happened or been done before
meanings.example: Can you say that again? I didn’t hear.
meanings.example_cn: 你能再说一遍吗？ 我没听见。

meanings.meaning_en: next to and touching an upright surface, especially for support
meanings.example: There was a ladder propped up against the wall.
meanings.example_cn: 有一把梯子靠在墙边。

meanings.meaning_en: the number of years someone has lived or something has existed
meanings.example: Francis is the same age as me.
meanings.example_cn: 弗朗西斯和我同年岁。

meanings.meaning_en: to start looking older or to make someone or something look older
meanings.example: Experts disagree over the age of the drawings.
meanings.example_cn: 专家对这些画作的年代意见不统一。

meanings.meaning_cn: ……岁的; 年老的，年迈的; 老化的; （马，农畜）超过成熟年龄的
meanings.example: The camp is for youngsters aged 8 to 14.
meanings.example_cn: 这次夏令营是为8至14岁的少年儿童安排的。

meanings.example: They have two children aged six and nine.
meanings.example_cn: 他们有两个小孩，一个六岁，一个九岁。

meanings.meaning_cn: 变老，老化; （使）显老; （使）变陈（age 的过去式和过去分词形式）
meanings.example: His fan base is mostly middle-aged ladies.
meanings.example_cn: 他的粉丝群主要是中年妇女。

meanings.meaning_en: used to show how far back in the past something happened
meanings.example: They moved to a new house some time ago (=  a fairly long time ago  ) .
meanings.example_cn: 他们搬进新居已有些日子了。

meanings.meaning_en: to have or express the same opinion about something as someone else
meanings.example: Teenagers and their parents rarely agree.
meanings.example_cn: 十几岁的孩子跟父母意见很少一致。

meanings.meaning_en: the mixture of gases around the Earth, that we breathe
meanings.example: Let’s go outside and get some fresh air.
meanings.example_cn: 我们出去呼吸些新鲜空气吧。

meanings.meaning_en: a place where planes take off and land, with buildings for passengers to wait in
meanings.example: The plane landed at Heathrow Airport.
meanings.example_cn: 飞机降落在希思罗机场。

meanings.meaning_cn: 闹钟：一种可以设定在特定时间响铃的钟表。
meanings.example: I set my alarm clock for 4:30.
meanings.example_cn: 我把闹钟定在4:30。

meanings.meaning_en: a book that you put photographs, stamps etc in
meanings.example: a photograph album
meanings.example_cn: 相册

meanings.meaning_en: the whole of an amount, thing, or type of thing
meanings.example: There is built-in storage space in all bedrooms.
meanings.example_cn: 所有卧室里都有内置储藏空间。

meanings.meaning_en: the whole of a particular group or thing or to everyone or everything of a particular kind
meanings.example: the restaurant that Hugh and all his friends go to
meanings.example_cn: 休和他所有的朋友们去的那家饭馆

meanings.meaning_cn: 各种各样的：许多不同种类的事物。
meanings.example: They sell all kinds of things.
meanings.example_cn: 他们出售各种各样的东西。

meanings.meaning_cn: 好的，可以的：表示同意或认可。
meanings.example: All right, I'll forgive you.
meanings.example_cn: 好吧，我愿意原谅你。

meanings.meaning_cn: 各种各样的：表示有很多不同种类或类型的事物。
meanings.example: Their offer was hedged around with all sorts of conditions.
meanings.example_cn: 他们的建议附带了各种各样的限制条件。

meanings.meaning_cn: 一直，始终：表示某事持续不断地发生或存在。
meanings.example: We can't be together all the time.
meanings.example_cn: 我们不能一直在一起。

meanings.meaning_en: nearly, but not completely or not quite
meanings.example: Have you almost finished?
meanings.example_cn: 你差不多完成了吗？

meanings.meaning_en: if you are alone in a place, there is no one with you
meanings.example: She lives alone.
meanings.example_cn: 她一个人生活。

meanings.meaning_en: without any help from other people
meanings.example: You shouldn’t leave a child alone in the house.
meanings.example_cn: 你不应该把小孩独自留在家里。

meanings.meaning_en: from one place on something such as a line, road, or edge towards the other end of it
meanings.example: We were driving along Follyfoot Road.
meanings.example_cn: 我们沿着福莱福特路行驶。

meanings.meaning_en: going forward
meanings.example: She glanced anxiously along the line of faces.
meanings.example_cn: 她焦急地扫视着这一排面孔。

meanings.meaning_en: before now or before a particular time in the pas
meanings.example: ‘Lunch? ’ ‘No thanks, I've already eaten. ’
meanings.example_cn: “午餐？”“不，谢谢，我已吃过了。”

meanings.example: Alright, maybe you're right.
meanings.example_cn: 好吧，也许你是对的。

meanings.example: Alright, I'll get it.
meanings.example_cn: 好吧，我买了。

meanings.meaning_en: in addition to something else that you have mentioned
meanings.example: Information is also available on women’s health care.
meanings.example_cn: 还可以获得有关女性保健方面的资料。

meanings.meaning_en: all the time, at all times, or every time
meanings.example: Always lock your bicycle to something secure.
meanings.example_cn: 每次都要把自行车锁在牢固的物体上。

meanings.example: We were amazed by the play's success.
meanings.example_cn: 我们惊叹该剧的成功。

meanings.meaning_cn: 使惊奇，使惊愕（amaze 的过去式和过去分词形式）
meanings.example: Just the size of the place amazed her.
meanings.example_cn: 仅仅地方之大就使她十分惊奇。

meanings.meaning_cn: 惊人的，了不起的; 令人诧异的，令人惊愕的; 令人高兴的
meanings.example: She has amazing powers of recall.
meanings.example_cn: 她有惊人的记忆力。

meanings.meaning_cn: 使惊奇，使惊愕（amaze 的现在分词形式）
meanings.example: BTW, the machine is simply amazing.
meanings.example_cn: 顺便提一句，这台机器简直太了不起了。

meanings.meaning_en: a special vehicle that is used to take people who are ill or injured to hospital
meanings.example: the ambulance service
meanings.example_cn: 救护车服务

meanings.meaning_en: in or through the middle of a group of people or things
meanings.example: The girl quickly disappeared among the crowd.
meanings.example_cn: 女孩转眼消失在人群中。

meanings.example: This recipe is an adaptation of an old favourite.
meanings.example_cn: 这个食谱是一个传统名食谱的改编。

meanings.example: The exam consists of an essay and an unseen translation.
meanings.example_cn: 考试包括一篇作文和一篇即席翻译。

meanings.meaning_en: used to join two words, phrases etc referring to things that are related in some way
meanings.example: He’s gone to get some fish and chips.
meanings.example_cn: 他去买炸鱼薯条了。

meanings.meaning_en: feeling strong emotions which make you want to shout at someone or hurt them because they have behaved in an unfair, cruel, offensive etc way, or because you think that a situation is unfair, unacceptable etc
meanings.example: I was angry because he hadn’t told me his plans.
meanings.example_cn: 我很生气，因为他没有告诉我他的计划。

meanings.meaning_en: a living creature such as a dog or cat, that is not an insect, plant, bird, fish, or person
meanings.example: furry little animals
meanings.example_cn: 毛茸茸的小动物

meanings.meaning_en: human feelings, desires etc that are connected with sex, food, and other basic needs
meanings.example: The cosmetics have not been tested on animals.
meanings.example_cn: 这些化妆品没有进行过动物试验。

meanings.meaning_en: not the same thing, person etc, but a different one
meanings.example: They must have returned by another route.
meanings.example_cn: 他们肯定是从另一条路线回来的。

meanings.meaning_en: to say something to someone as a reply when they have asked you a question, made a suggestion etc
meanings.example: She thought for a moment before answering.
meanings.example_cn: 她想了一会儿才回答。

meanings.meaning_en: some or even the smallest amount or number
meanings.example: Have you got any money?
meanings.example_cn: 你身上有没有钱？

meanings.meaning_en: anyone
meanings.example: You should have a try, don't swallow anybody.
meanings.example_cn: 不要轻信任何人，你得亲自去试一试。

meanings.meaning_en: not any longer
meanings.example: Nick doesn’t live here anymore.
meanings.example_cn: 尼克不再住在这里了。

meanings.meaning_en: used to refer to any person, when it is not important to say exactly who
meanings.example: Anyone could win tonight.
meanings.example_cn: 今晚任何人都可能赢。

meanings.meaning_en: any thing, event, situation etc, when it is not important to say exactly which
meanings.example: You can buy anything you want.
meanings.example_cn: 你想要什么都可以买。

meanings.meaning_en: used to indicate that a statement explains or supports a previous statement
meanings.example: I know I'll be confronted with difficulties, but I will squeak by anyway.
meanings.example_cn: 我知道我会遇到许多困难，可我无论如何总能应付过去。

meanings.meaning_en: in or to any place
meanings.example: I haven't got anywhere to live.
meanings.example_cn: 我没有任何地方住。

meanings.meaning_en: a set of rooms on one floor of a large building, where someone lives
meanings.example: She lives in a small apartment.
meanings.example_cn: 她住在一套小公寓里。

meanings.example: Taking a ride on the hormonal roller-coaster means lots of changes—and a lot of common worries—for both guys and girls.
meanings.example_cn: 坐荷尔蒙过山车意味着许多变化——我们都有共同的担忧——无论是对于男孩还是女孩。

meanings.meaning_cn: （计算机）应用程序，应用软件; <美，非正式>开胃菜
meanings.example: The Net's real killer app is email.
meanings.example_cn: 因特网真正的杀手应用软件是邮件。

meanings.meaning_cn: 【名】  （App）（美、德、巴）阿普（人名）; （App）（美、德、巴）阿普（人名）
meanings.example: What is the core of your app?
meanings.example_cn: 你的应用程序的核心是什么？

meanings.meaning_en: a hard round fruit that has red, light green, or yellow skin and is white inside
meanings.example: apple pie
meanings.example_cn: 苹果馅饼

meanings.meaning_en: an arrangement for a meeting at an agreed time and place, for a particular purpose
meanings.example: All consultations are by appointment only.
meanings.example_cn: 就诊必须预约。

meanings.meaning_en: a particular part of a country, town etc
meanings.example: Only cheeses made in this area may be labelled ‘Roquefort.’
meanings.example_cn: 只有这个地区出产的干酪才能被称作“罗克福尔干酪”。

meanings.meaning_en: one of the two long parts of your body between your shoulders and your hands
meanings.example: Dave has a broken arm .
meanings.example_cn: 戴夫手臂断了。

meanings.example: I sank down into a voluminous armchair.
meanings.example_cn: 我一下子坐在了宽大的扶手椅里。

meanings.meaning_cn: 空想的，无实际经验的; 夸夸其谈的
meanings.example: He was lying sprawled in an armchair, watching TV.
meanings.example_cn: 他四肢伸开正懒散地靠在扶手椅上看电视。

meanings.meaning_en: surrounding or on all sides of something or someone
meanings.example: The whole family was sitting around the dinner table.
meanings.example_cn: 全家人围坐在饭桌旁。

meanings.meaning_en: to get to the place you are going to
meanings.example: Give me a call to let me know you’ve arrived safely.
meanings.example_cn: 打个电话给我，告诉我你已平安到达。

meanings.meaning_en: the use of painting, drawing,  sculpture  etc to represent things or express ideas
meanings.example: the Museum of Modern Art in New York
meanings.example_cn: 纽约现代艺术博物馆

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of writing about a particular subject in a newspaper or magazine
meanings.example: The paper’s leading article (=  the main article  ) described the government as weak.
meanings.example_cn: 该报社论称政府软弱。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who produces art, especially paintings or drawings
meanings.example: an exhibition of paintings by local artists
meanings.example_cn: 当地画家的画展

meanings.meaning_en: while or when
meanings.example: I saw Peter as I was getting off the bus.
meanings.example_cn: 我下公共汽车的时候看见了彼得。

meanings.example: Are they coming as well?
meanings.example_cn: 他们也来吗？

meanings.meaning_en: to speak or write to someone in order to get an answer, information, or a solution
meanings.example: ‘What’s your name?’ she asked.
meanings.example_cn: “你叫什么名字？”她问道 。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who helps someone else in their work, especially by doing the less important jobs
meanings.example: a clerical assistant
meanings.example_cn: 文书助理

meanings.meaning_en: used to say exactly where something or someone is, or where something happens
meanings.example: They live at 18 Victoria Street.
meanings.example_cn: 他们住在维多利亚街18 号。

meanings.meaning_cn: 以任何方式或方面，到最小的程度或程度，或在任何情况下
meanings.example: He doesn't understand women at all.
meanings.example_cn: 他根本就不了解女性。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is attractive is good looking, especially in a way that makes you sexually interested in them
meanings.example: an attractive young woman
meanings.example_cn: 妩媚动人的年轻女子

meanings.meaning_en: the sister of your father or mother, or the wife of your father’s or mother’s brother
meanings.example: Aunt Mary
meanings.example_cn: 玛丽姑妈

meanings.meaning_en: the season between summer and winter, when leaves change colour and the weather becomes cooler
meanings.example: autumn mists
meanings.example_cn: 秋天的雾霭

meanings.meaning_en: something that is available is able to be used or can easily be bought or found
meanings.example: Tickets are available from the box office.
meanings.example_cn: 售票处有票出售。

meanings.meaning_en: used to say that someone leaves a place or person, or stays some distance from a place or person
meanings.example: Go away!
meanings.example_cn: 走开！

meanings.meaning_cn: 可怕的, 表示敬畏的
meanings.meaning_en: extremely impressive, serious, or difficult so that you feel great respect, worry, or fear
meanings.example: an awesome responsibility
meanings.example_cn: 一项令人惊惧的责任

meanings.meaning_en: very bad or unpleasant
meanings.example: The weather was awful.
meanings.example_cn: 天气很糟糕。

meanings.meaning_en: a very young child who has not yet learned to speak or walk
meanings.example: The baby is crying.
meanings.example_cn: 宝宝在哭。

meanings.meaning_en: in, into, or to the place or position where someone or something was before
meanings.example: I’ll be back in a minute.
meanings.example_cn: 我马上回来。

meanings.meaning_cn: 背包，行囊; 背负装置
meanings.example: An unattended backpack was found in a rubbish pile.
meanings.example_cn: 在垃圾桶里发现了一个无人看管的背包。

meanings.meaning_cn: 背包旅行; 挑运，把……放入背包
meanings.example: He had a small green backpack slung over one shoulder.
meanings.example_cn: 他把一只绿色小背包搭在一边肩上。

meanings.meaning_en: morally wrong or evil
meanings.example: He’s a bad man – keep away from him.
meanings.example_cn: 他是个坏人，离他远一点。

meanings.meaning_en: in an unsatisfactory or unsuccessful way
meanings.example: The company has been very badly managed.
meanings.example_cn: 这家公司的管理非常差。

meanings.meaning_en: a game that is similar to tennis but played with a shuttlecock instead of a ball
meanings.example: Can I try you new badminton racket?
meanings.example_cn: 我可以试用你的羽毛球拍吗？

meanings.meaning_en: the amount that a bag will hold
meanings.example: She left the hotel carrying a shopping bag.
meanings.example_cn: 她拎着一个购物袋离开了宾馆。

meanings.meaning_en: to cook something using dry heat, in an oven
meanings.example: I’m baking some bread.
meanings.example_cn: 我在烤一些面包。

meanings.meaning_en: a round object that is thrown, kicked, or hit in a game or sport
meanings.example: a tennis/golf/cricket etc ball
meanings.example_cn: 网球/高尔夫球/板球等

meanings.meaning_en: an object made of brightly coloured thin rubber, that is filled with air and used as a toy or decoration for parties
meanings.example: Can you help me blow up these balloons?
meanings.example_cn: 你帮我把这些气球吹起来好吗？

meanings.meaning_en: a long curved tropical fruit with a yellow skin
meanings.example: a bunch of bananas
meanings.example_cn: 一串香蕉

meanings.meaning_en: a group of musicians, especially a group that plays popular music
meanings.example: The band was playing old Beatles songs.
meanings.example_cn: 乐队正在演奏披头士的老歌。

meanings.meaning_en: an organization that provides various financial services, for example keeping or lending money
meanings.example: My salary is paid directly into my bank.
meanings.example_cn: 我的工资直接拨到我的银行。

meanings.meaning_en: a meal or party during which food is cooked on a metal frame over a fire and eaten outdoors
meanings.example: We had a barbecue on the beach.
meanings.example_cn: 我们在海滩上烧烤。

meanings.meaning_en: an outdoor game between two teams of nine players, in which players try to get points by hitting a ball and running around four  base s
meanings.example: His cane answered for a baseball bat.
meanings.example_cn: 他的手杖可代用棒球棒。

meanings.meaning_en: a game played indoors between two teams of five players, in which each team tries to win points by throwing a ball through a net
meanings.example: We love playing basketball.
meanings.example_cn: 我们爱打篮球。

meanings.meaning_en: a long wooden stick with a special shape that is used in some sports and games
meanings.example: a baseball bat
meanings.example_cn: 一只棒球棒

meanings.meaning_en: an act of washing your whole body by sitting or lying in water
meanings.example: After a week of camping, I really needed a bath.
meanings.example_cn: 我露营了一个星期，实在得洗个澡了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 游泳衣：一种穿在游泳时的服装，通常由上衣和短裤组成。
meanings.example: Of course, everyone should bring a bathing suit and a towel.
meanings.example_cn: 当然，每个人应该带一件泳衣和一条毛巾。

meanings.meaning_en: a room in which there is a bath/bathtub , a washbasin and often a toilet
meanings.example: Go and wash your hands in the bathroom.
meanings.example_cn: 到盥洗室洗手去。

meanings.example: The bathtub was too small to stretch out in.
meanings.example_cn: 这个浴缸太小了躺不下。

meanings.meaning_en: an object that provides a supply of electricity for something such as a radio, car, or toy
meanings.example: You have to take the top off to change the batteries .
meanings.example_cn: 你得把顶盖拿掉才能更换电池。

meanings.meaning_en: used to say that someone or something is the same as the subject of the sentence
meanings.example: My name is Susan.
meanings.example_cn: 我的名字叫苏珊。

meanings.meaning_en: an area of sand or small stones at the edge of the sea or a lake
meanings.example: a sandy beach
meanings.example_cn: 沙滩

meanings.meaning_en: a seed or a  pod, that comes from a climbing plant and is cooked as food. There are very many types of beans.
meanings.example: baked beans
meanings.example_cn: 烘豆

meanings.meaning_en: a large strong animal with thick fur, that eats flesh, fruit, and insects
meanings.example: a mother bear and her cubs
meanings.example_cn: 母熊和它的熊崽们

meanings.meaning_en: hair that grows around a man’s chin and cheeks
meanings.example: He's decided to grow a beard.
meanings.example_cn: 他已经决定蓄胡须。

meanings.meaning_en: someone or something that is beautiful is extremely attractive to look at
meanings.example: She was even more beautiful than I had remembered.
meanings.example_cn: 她比我记忆中更美。

meanings.meaning_en: used when you are giving the reason for something
meanings.example: We didn’t enjoy the day because the weather was so awful.
meanings.example_cn: 那天我们很不尽兴，因为天气实在太糟。

meanings.meaning_cn: 因为：表示某事发生的原因或原因所在。
meanings.example: They are here because of us.
meanings.example_cn: 他们是因为我们来这里的。

meanings.meaning_en: to start to have a feeling or quality, or to start to develop into something
meanings.example: The weather became warmer.
meanings.example_cn: 天气变暖和了。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of furniture that you sleep on
meanings.example: You should go to bed early.
meanings.example_cn: 你应该早点上床。

meanings.meaning_en: a room for sleeping in
meanings.example: a hotel with 50 bedrooms
meanings.example_cn: 有50间客房的旅馆

meanings.meaning_en: a black and yellow flying insect that makes  honey  and can sting you
meanings.example: a swarm of bees
meanings.example_cn: 一群蜜蜂

meanings.meaning_en: an insect with a round hard back that is usually black
meanings.example: He studied the Namib beetle, an ingenious species that lives in one of the driest places on earth.
meanings.example_cn: 他研究了纳米布甲虫，这是一种机灵的物种，生活在世界上最干燥的地方之一。

meanings.meaning_en: earlier than something or someone
meanings.example: The new road should be completed before the end of the year.
meanings.example_cn: 这条新公路应该在年底前完工。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who has just started to do or learn something
meanings.example: an absolute beginner
meanings.example_cn: 不折不扣的初学者

meanings.meaning_en: the start or first part of an event, story, period of time etc
meanings.example: There’s a short poem at the beginning of every chapter.
meanings.example_cn: 每一章的开头都有一首短诗。

meanings.meaning_en: at or towards the back of a thing or person
meanings.example: I turned to speak to the person standing behind me.
meanings.example_cn: 我转身和站在我后面的那人说话。

meanings.meaning_en: to be sure that something is true or that someone is telling the truth
meanings.example: You shouldn’t believe everything you read.
meanings.example_cn: 你不应尽信书上看来的东西。

meanings.meaning_en: If something belongs to you, you own it
meanings.example: The house had belonged to her family for three or four generations.
meanings.example_cn: 这座房子属于她家已有三四代了。

meanings.meaning_en: at or to a lower level or position than sb/sth
meanings.example: He dived below the surface of the water.
meanings.example_cn: 他潜入了水中。

meanings.meaning_en: a band of leather, cloth etc that you wear around your waist to hold up your clothes or for decoration
meanings.example: He unbuckled his leather belt.
meanings.example_cn: 他解开皮带。

meanings.meaning_en: next to or very close to the side of someone or something
meanings.example: Wendy came up and sat beside me.
meanings.example_cn: 温迪走过来，坐在我身边。

meanings.meaning_en: better than anything else or anyone else in quality, skill, how effective it is etc
meanings.example: He won the best actor award.
meanings.example_cn: 他获得最佳男演员奖。

meanings.meaning_en: more useful, interesting, satisfactory, effective, suitable etc
meanings.example: Your stereo is better than mine.
meanings.example_cn: 你的音响比我的好。

meanings.meaning_en: to a higher standard or quality
meanings.example: There must be a better way to do this.
meanings.example_cn: 一定还有更好的办法来做这件事。

meanings.meaning_en: in or into the space separating two or more points, objects, people, etc.
meanings.example: Q comes between P and R in the English alphabet.
meanings.example_cn: 英语字母表中，Q在P和R之间。

meanings.meaning_en: a vehicle with two wheels that you ride by pushing its pedals with your feet
meanings.example: Can James ride a bicycle yet?
meanings.example_cn: 詹姆斯会骑自行车了吗？

meanings.meaning_en: of more than average size or amount
meanings.example: a big house
meanings.example_cn: 大房子

meanings.meaning_en: a bicycle
meanings.example: Let’s go for a bike ride.
meanings.example_cn: 我们去骑会儿自行车吧。

meanings.meaning_en: to ride a bicycle
meanings.example: She bikes to work every day.
meanings.example_cn: 她每天骑自行车上班。

meanings.meaning_en: a written list showing how much you have to pay for services you have received, work that has been done etc
meanings.example: Have you paid the phone bill?
meanings.example_cn: 电话费你付了吗？

meanings.meaning_cn: 垃圾桶; 储物箱; 瓶酒搁架; 统计堆栈
meanings.example: I kicked a rubbish bin very hard and broke my toe.
meanings.example_cn: 我狠狠踢一个垃圾桶，踢破了脚趾头。

meanings.meaning_cn: 把……扔进垃圾箱; 摒弃，拒绝; 把……放（或贮藏）在箱（或仓）中; 把（酒等）放进搁架; 把（数据）归入统计堆
meanings.example: She scrunched up three pages of notes and threw them in the bin.
meanings.example_cn: 她把3页笔记揉成团并把它们扔进了垃圾箱。

meanings.example: Now, thousands of mailshots, catalogues and sales pitches go straight into the bin.
meanings.example_cn: 现在，数千的邮寄广告、商家目录和促销传单直接就进了垃圾桶。

meanings.meaning_en: the scientific study of living things
meanings.example: a degree in biology
meanings.example_cn: 生物学学位

meanings.meaning_en: a creature with wings and feathers that can usually fly. Many birds sing and build nests, and female birds lay eggs
meanings.example: wild birds
meanings.example_cn: 野鸟

meanings.meaning_en: the time when a baby comes out of its mother’s body
meanings.example: Congratulations on the birth of your daughter!
meanings.example_cn: 恭喜你生了个女儿！

meanings.meaning_en: the day in each year which is the same date as the one on which you were born
meanings.example: It’s my birthday on Monday.
meanings.example_cn: 星期一是我的生日。

meanings.meaning_en: a small thin dry cake that is usually sweet and made for one person to eat
meanings.example: a packet of chocolate biscuits
meanings.example_cn: 一包巧克力饼干

meanings.meaning_en: a small piece of something
meanings.example: He’s taken the engine to bits .
meanings.example_cn: 他把发动机拆开了。

meanings.meaning_en: having the darkest colour, like coal or night
meanings.example: a black evening dress
meanings.example_cn: 黑色晚礼服

meanings.meaning_en: a board with a dark smooth surface, used in schools for writing on with  chalk
meanings.example: He chalked out a design on the blackboard.
meanings.example_cn: 他用粉笔在黑板上勾划出一个图样。

meanings.meaning_en: a cover for a bed, usually made of wool
meanings.example: She huddled herself in the blanket.
meanings.example_cn: 她用毯子紧紧裹住自己。

meanings.meaning_en: the distance along a city street from where one street crosses it to the next
meanings.example: Head for 44th Street, a few blocks east of Sixth Avenue.
meanings.example_cn: 往44号街走，从第六大街往东走几个街区就是。

meanings.meaning_en: to prevent anything moving through a space by being or placing something across it or in it
meanings.example: The church is down the block.
meanings.example_cn: 教堂就在这个街区那头。

meanings.example: When Barbieux started his blog, his aspirations were small; he simply hoped to communicate with a few people.
meanings.example_cn: 当巴布开始他的博客时，他的期望并不大。他只是希望能与几个人交流。

meanings.example: I have to shut down my blog.
meanings.example_cn: 我得关掉我的博客。

meanings.meaning_en: the red liquid that your heart pumps around your body
meanings.example: Her body was found in a pool of blood.
meanings.example_cn: 她的尸体被发现倒在血泊之中。

meanings.meaning_en: a shirt for women
meanings.example: a silk blouse
meanings.example_cn: 丝质女衬衫

meanings.meaning_en: having the colour of the sky or the sea on a fine day
meanings.example: the blue waters of the lake
meanings.example_cn: 蓝蓝的湖水

meanings.meaning_en: the colour of the sky or the sea on a fine day
meanings.example: She nearly always dresses in blue.
meanings.example_cn: 她几乎总是穿蓝色的衣服。

meanings.meaning_en: a flat piece of wood, plastic, card etc that you use for a particular purpose such as cutting things on, or for playing indoor games
meanings.example: Martha was chopping vegetables on a wooden board.
meanings.example_cn: 玛莎正在用一块木砧板切蔬菜。

meanings.meaning_en: to get on a bus, plane, train etc in order to travel somewhere
meanings.example: a chess board
meanings.example_cn: 棋盘

meanings.meaning_cn: 棋盘游戏：一种通过在棋盘上放置或移动棋子来进行的游戏，例如跳棋、国际象棋或三子棋等。
meanings.example: Go, commonly known in China as weiqi, is a board game for two players.
meanings.example_cn: 中国的围棋，西方称之为“Go”，是一种两人对弈的棋盘游戏。

meanings.meaning_en: a vehicle that travels across water
meanings.example: a fishing boat
meanings.example_cn: 渔船

meanings.meaning_en: the physical structure of a person or animal
meanings.example: the human body
meanings.example_cn: 人体

meanings.meaning_en: when a liquid boils or when you boil it, it is heated to the point where it forms bubbles and turns to steam or vapour
meanings.example: Put the spaghetti into plenty of boiling salted water.
meanings.example_cn: 把意大利面放入大量煮沸的盐水中。

meanings.example: The boiled potato was mealy.
meanings.example_cn: 这个煮土豆干巴巴的。

meanings.meaning_cn: 煮（boil 的过去式和过去分词）
meanings.example: Onions can be boiled and pulped to a puree.
meanings.example_cn: 洋葱可以煮熟，捣成泥。

meanings.meaning_en: a set of printed pages that are held together in a cover so that you can read them
meanings.example: I’ve just started reading a book by Graham Greene.
meanings.example_cn: 我刚开始看格雷厄姆·格林写的一本书。

meanings.meaning_en: to make arrangements to stay in a place, eat in a restaurant, go to a theatre etc at a particular time in the future
meanings.example: a cookery book
meanings.example_cn: 烹饪书

meanings.example: The bookcase is screwed to the wall.
meanings.example_cn: 书架用螺丝固定在墙上了。

meanings.example: Where is my yellow bookshelf?
meanings.example_cn: 我的黄色书架在哪里？

meanings.example: I found a lovely bookshop and bought two of his fairy tale books, The Little Mermaid and The Ugly Duckling.
meanings.example_cn: 我发现了一家可爱的书店，买了他的两本童话书，《小美人鱼》和《丑小鸭》。

meanings.example: The bookstore opened last year.
meanings.example_cn: 书店去年开张了。

meanings.meaning_en: a type of shoe that covers your whole foot and the lower part of your leg
meanings.example: hiking boots
meanings.example_cn: 远足靴

meanings.meaning_cn: 无聊的，厌倦的; （枪）有特定口径的
meanings.example: The boys were getting bored.
meanings.example_cn: 男孩子们渐渐变得厌烦起来。

meanings.meaning_cn: 使厌烦; 钻; 盯着看（bore 的过去式和过去分词形式）
meanings.example: Well, at least they weren't bored.
meanings.example_cn: 唔，反正他们没有厌烦。

meanings.meaning_cn: 令人厌烦的; 乏味的，无趣的，无聊的
meanings.example: She found her job very boring.
meanings.example_cn: 她觉得自己的工作很无聊。

meanings.meaning_cn: 钻孔，扩洞; 钻成的孔，扩大的洞
meanings.example: Exercising alone can be boring.
meanings.example_cn: 独自一个人锻炼可能会很无聊。

meanings.meaning_cn: 使厌烦; 钻; 盯着看（bore 的现在分词形式）
meanings.example: She finds it boring at home.
meanings.example_cn: 她觉得待在家里无聊。

meanings.example: She found her job very boring.
meanings.example_cn: 她觉得自己的工作很无聊。

meanings.meaning_en: having a natural ability or skill for a particular activity or job
meanings.example: a born athlete/writer/leader
meanings.example_cn: 天生的运动员 / 作家 / 领袖

meanings.meaning_en: to use something that belongs to someone else and that you must give back to them later
meanings.example: Can I borrow your pen for a minute?
meanings.example_cn: 我可以借你的笔用一下吗？

meanings.meaning_en: the person who employs you or who is in charge of you at work
meanings.example: I’ll have to ask my boss for a day off.
meanings.example_cn: 我得向老板请一天假。

meanings.meaning_en: to tell people to do things, give them orders etc, especially when you have no authority to do it
meanings.example: Since I’m my own boss (=  I work for myself, rather than for an employer  ) , my hours are flexible.
meanings.example_cn: 我自己当老板，所以我的时间很灵活。

meanings.meaning_en: used to talk about two people, things etc together, and emphasize that each is included
meanings.example: Both Helen’s parents are doctors.
meanings.example_cn: 海伦的父母都是医生。

meanings.meaning_en: to annoy, worry or upset sb
meanings.example: Danny, don’t bother Ellen while she’s reading.
meanings.example_cn: 丹尼，埃伦看书的时候不要去打扰她 。

meanings.meaning_en: trouble or difficulty
meanings.example: You seem to have got yourself into a spot of bother.
meanings.example_cn: 你似乎让自己遇上了点麻烦。

meanings.meaning_en: a container with a narrow top for keeping liquids in, usually made of plastic or glass
meanings.example: an empty bottle
meanings.example_cn: 一个空瓶子

meanings.meaning_en: the lowest part of something
meanings.example: Can you hold the bottom of the ladder for me?
meanings.example_cn: 你帮我扶住梯子底部好吗？

meanings.meaning_en: a wide round container that is open at the top, used to hold liquids, food, flowers etc
meanings.example: Mix all the ingredients thoroughly in a large bowl.
meanings.example_cn: 将所有配料放在大碗里搅拌均匀。

meanings.meaning_cn: 碗状发型：一种发型，头发两侧和后部修剪短，顶部留长，看起来就像是只有头顶上没有被倒置碗覆盖的头发被剪掉了一样。
meanings.example: Second, like Boyle, his style is somewhat…retro. We love that bowl cut.
meanings.example_cn: 第二，跟苏珊大妈一样，他的风格也有点儿……老派。我们爱死他那个西瓜头发型了。

meanings.meaning_en: a container for putting things in, especially one with four stiff straight sides
meanings.example: a strong cardboard box
meanings.example_cn: 一只结实的纸板箱

meanings.meaning_en: a male child, or a male person in general
meanings.example: The boys wanted to play football.
meanings.example_cn: 男孩子们想踢足球。

meanings.example: Rachel has a new boyfriend.
meanings.example_cn: 雷切尔交了一个新的男朋友。

meanings.example: Her bracelet was set with emeralds.
meanings.example_cn: 她的手镯上镶有绿宝石。

meanings.meaning_en: the organ inside your head that controls how you think, feel, and move
meanings.example: Messages from the brain are carried by the central nervous system.
meanings.example_cn: 大脑发出的信息是通过中枢神经系统传递的。

meanings.meaning_en: dealing with danger, pain, or difficult situations with courage and confidence
meanings.example: brave soldiers
meanings.example_cn: 勇敢的士兵

meanings.meaning_en: a type of food made from flour and water that is mixed together and then baked
meanings.example: Would you like some bread with your soup?
meanings.example_cn: 你喝汤时要吃点面包吗？

meanings.meaning_en: if you break something, you make it separate into two or more pieces, for example by hitting it, dropping it, or bending it
meanings.example: I had to break a window to get into the house.
meanings.example_cn: 我只得打破一扇窗户进屋。

meanings.meaning_cn: 使倒塌或破碎：将物体引起倒塌或破碎。
meanings.example: Many people were expecting (that) the peace talks would break down.
meanings.example_cn: 许多人预料和平谈判会破裂。

meanings.example: She made numerous efforts to break down colour lines in public places.
meanings.example_cn: 她为打破公共场所的种族界限做出过许多努力。

meanings.meaning_cn: 分解：将化合物分解为更简单的物质。
meanings.example: She had been waiting for Simon to break down the barrier between them.
meanings.example_cn: 她一直在等着西蒙来破除他们之间的隔阂。

meanings.meaning_cn: 拆开：为了存储或运输而拆开，以便以后重新组装。
meanings.example: Many people were expecting (that) the peace talks would break down.
meanings.example_cn: 许多人预料和平谈判会破裂。

meanings.meaning_cn: 停止运行：因为损坏或磨损而停止运行。
meanings.example: Many people were expecting (that) the peace talks would break down.
meanings.example_cn: 许多人预料和平谈判会破裂。

meanings.example: Many people were expecting (that) the peace talks would break down.
meanings.example_cn: 许多人预料和平谈判会破裂。

meanings.meaning_cn: 力量或活力衰竭：力量或活力减弱或消失。
meanings.example: Many people were expecting (that) the peace talks would break down.
meanings.example_cn: 许多人预料和平谈判会破裂。

meanings.meaning_cn: 精神或情绪崩溃：因为心理或情绪压力而崩溃。
meanings.example: Many people were expecting (that) the peace talks would break down.
meanings.example_cn: 许多人预料和平谈判会破裂。

meanings.meaning_cn: 放弃抵抗：失去决心或放弃抵抗。
meanings.example: Many people were expecting (that) the peace talks would break down.
meanings.example_cn: 许多人预料和平谈判会破裂。

meanings.meaning_cn: （马匹）严重受伤：马匹的蹄关节的支持韧带或骨骼严重受伤。
meanings.example: Many people were expecting (that) the peace talks would break down.
meanings.example_cn: 许多人预料和平谈判会破裂。

meanings.meaning_cn: 分析或细分：进行分析或细分。
meanings.example: Many people were expecting (that) the peace talks would break down.
meanings.example_cn: 许多人预料和平谈判会破裂。

meanings.meaning_en: the meal you have in the morning
meanings.example: We had bacon and eggs for breakfast .
meanings.example_cn: 我们早餐吃了熏肉鸡蛋。

meanings.meaning_en: a structure built over a river, road etc that allows people or vehicles to cross from one side to the other
meanings.example: He walked back over the railway bridge.
meanings.example_cn: 他从铁路桥上走了回去。

meanings.meaning_en: shining strongly, or with plenty of light
meanings.example: Her eyes were hurting from the bright lights.
meanings.example_cn: 明亮的光线刺痛了她的眼睛。

meanings.meaning_en: brilliant light or colour is very bright and strong
meanings.example: She closed her eyes against the brilliant light.
meanings.example_cn: 强烈的光线下，她闭起了眼睛。

meanings.meaning_en: to take something or someone with you to the place where you are now, or to the place you are talking about
meanings.example: Did you bring an umbrella?
meanings.example_cn: 你带伞了吗？

meanings.example: Could you bring back some groceries after work?
meanings.example_cn: 你下班后可不可以买一些杂货回来？

meanings.example: They bring back cinnamon, nutmeg, and all sorts of valuables.
meanings.example_cn: 他们带回来肉桂、肉豆蔻和各种贵重物品。

meanings.meaning_cn: 使恢复，使回到某种状态
meanings.example: Besides planting more trees, China has tried to bring back grasslands.
meanings.example_cn: 除了种植更多树木以外，中国还试图恢复草原。

meanings.example: Could you bring back some groceries after work?
meanings.example_cn: 你下班后可不可以买一些杂货回来？

meanings.meaning_en: in small pieces because it has been hit, dropped etc
meanings.example: Mind the broken glass.
meanings.example_cn: 当心碎玻璃。

meanings.meaning_en: a male who has the same parents as you
meanings.example: I have two brothers, William and Mark.
meanings.example_cn: 我有两个兄弟，威廉和马克。

meanings.meaning_en: the colour of earth, wood, or coffee
meanings.example: This particular model is available in brown, white, or grey.
meanings.example_cn: 这个型号的产品有棕色、白色和灰色的。

meanings.meaning_en: an object that you use for cleaning, painting, making your hair tidy etc, made with a lot of hairs,  bristle s  , or thin pieces of plastic, fastened to a handle
meanings.example: a scrubbing brush
meanings.example_cn: 硬毛刷，板刷

meanings.meaning_en: to make something, especially a building or something large
meanings.example: The purpose is to build new houses for local people.
meanings.example_cn: 目的是要为当地居民建造新的住宅。

meanings.meaning_en: a structure such as a house, church, or factory, that has a roof and walls
meanings.example: The offices are on the top two floors of the building.
meanings.example_cn: 办公室在大楼最高的两层。

meanings.meaning_cn: 汉堡包，夹心牛肉饼; （类似汉堡包的）馅饼
meanings.example: You can have a burger, but you can't have fries as well.
meanings.example_cn: 你可以吃汉堡包，但不可以同时又吃炸薯条。

meanings.meaning_cn: 【名】 （Burger）（西）布尔赫尔，(法)比尔热，(英)伯格，（德、罗、捷、塞、匈）布格尔（人名）
meanings.example: In May, a judge ruled in favour of Burger King.
meanings.example_cn: 5月，一名法官做出了有利于汉堡王的裁决。

meanings.meaning_en: a large vehicle that people pay to travel on
meanings.example: I took a bus to San Francisco.
meanings.example_cn: 我乘公共汽车去旧金山。

meanings.meaning_cn: 公交车站：一个重要的公交车站，作为多条路线之间的换乘点。
meanings.example: Excuse me. Where's the bus station?
meanings.example_cn: 请问公交站在哪儿？

meanings.example: I saw Louise walking slowly to the bus stop.
meanings.example_cn: 我看见路易斯慢慢地走向公共汽车站。

meanings.meaning_en: the activity of making money by producing or buying and selling goods, or providing services
meanings.example: Students on the course learn about all aspects of business.
meanings.example_cn: 这门课程的学生要学习商业活动的各个方面。

meanings.meaning_cn: 商人：从事商业活动的人，尤其是一个执行商务交易的人。
meanings.example: Waving or pointing to an Arab business person would be considered rude because that is how Arabs call their dogs over.
meanings.example_cn: 向阿拉伯商人挥手或用手指他们是粗鲁的，因为阿拉伯人就是这样叫唤他们的狗的。

meanings.example: Warren was an adventurous businessman.
meanings.example_cn: 沃伦是一位有冒险精神的商人。

meanings.example: Australian science agency CSIRO recently received this adorable letter.
meanings.example_cn: 澳大利亚的科研组织CSIRO最近收到了这封可爱的信。

meanings.meaning_en: a woman who works in business
if you are busy, you are working hard and have a lot of things to do
meanings.example: She’s busy now – can you phone later?
meanings.example_cn: 她现在正忙，你稍后打来好吗？

meanings.meaning_en: used to connect two statements or phrases when the second one adds something different or seems surprising after the first one
meanings.example: It’s an old car, but it’s very reliable.
meanings.example_cn: 这是一辆旧车，但是性能非常可靠。

meanings.meaning_en: a soft yellow food made from cream or milk, used in cooking and for spreading on bread
meanings.example: He spread some butter on his bread.
meanings.example_cn: 他在面包上涂了些黄油。

meanings.meaning_en: a type of insect that has large wings, often with beautiful colours
meanings.example: Butterflies and moths are attracted to the wild flowers.
meanings.example_cn: 蝴蝶和飞蛾为野花所吸引。

meanings.meaning_en: to get something by paying money for it
meanings.example: Where did you buy that dress?
meanings.example_cn: 那条裙子你在哪儿买的？

meanings.meaning_en: beside or near something
meanings.example: She stood by the window.
meanings.example_cn: 她站在窗边。

meanings.example: Helen got into acting purely by accident.
meanings.example_cn: 海伦当演员完全出于偶然。

meanings.meaning_cn: 通过邮寄方式：指的是信件、文件等通过邮局递送到家庭或工作场所。
meanings.example: I'll send the original to you by post.
meanings.example_cn: 我将把原件邮寄给你。

meanings.meaning_cn: 顺便说一下：用于引入一个与当前话题相关但不直接相关的话题的短语。
meanings.example: What's the time, by the way?
meanings.example_cn: 顺便问一句，几点钟了？

meanings.example: "Anyway, I'd better let you have your dinner. Bye."
meanings.example_cn: “好了，我最好让你吃晚餐了。再见！”

meanings.meaning_cn: 轮空（参赛者无对手而自动进入下一轮比赛）; 无接触得分; （因赛局已定而未打的）余穴; （非正式）次要的东西
meanings.example: She waved bye-bye and got into the car.
meanings.example_cn: 她挥手道别后就钻进了汽车。

meanings.example: Thanks, I will. Bye-bye.
meanings.example_cn: 谢谢，我会的。拜拜。

meanings.meaning_en: the politicians with important positions in a government who meet to make decisions or advise the leader of the government
meanings.example: a cabinet meeting
meanings.example_cn: 内阁会议

meanings.meaning_en: a restaurant, often in a factory, college etc, where you choose from foods that have already been cooked and carry your own food to a table
meanings.example: the school cafeteria
meanings.example_cn: 学校餐厅

meanings.meaning_en: a soft sweet food made by baking a mixture of flour, butter, sugar, and eggs
meanings.example: We had cake and ice cream.
meanings.example_cn: 我们吃了蛋糕和冰激凌。

meanings.meaning_en: a set of pages that show the days, weeks, and months of a particular year, that you usually hang on a wall
meanings.example: There was a calendar on the wall above, with large squares around the dates.
meanings.example_cn: 墙的上方曾有一本日历，日期框在大方格里。

meanings.meaning_en: to use a word or name to describe someone or something in a particular way
meanings.example: You may call it harmless fun, but I call it pornography.
meanings.example_cn: 你可能会说这是无恶意的小玩笑，但是我却认为这是色情。

meanings.meaning_en: a large desert animal with a long neck and either one or two shumps on its back
meanings.example: When fresh food and water are not available,the camel can feed off its hump.
meanings.example_cn: 在没有新食物和水供应时，骆驼从它的驼峰中获取能量。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of equipment used to take photographs or make films or television programmes
meanings.example: Her grandmother lent her a camera for a school trip to Venice and Egypt.
meanings.example_cn: 她的祖母借给她一部相机，让她在学校组织的到威尼斯和埃及的旅行中使用。

meanings.meaning_en: a place where people stay in tents, shelters etc for a short time, usually in the mountains, a forest etc
meanings.example: Let’s go back to camp – it’s getting dark.
meanings.example_cn: 我们回营地吧，天快黑了。

meanings.example: They went camping in the wild.
meanings.example_cn: 他们在野外露营。

meanings.meaning_cn: 露营，野营; 借住，暂住; 盘踞，据守（camp 的现在分词）
meanings.example: They go camping in France every year.
meanings.example_cn: 他们每年去法国野营。

meanings.meaning_en: an area where people can camp, often with a water supply and toilets
meanings.example: Then the journey continues on to a campsite where camels await you.
meanings.example_cn: 然后继续前往一个营地，在那里会有骆驼恭候大驾。

meanings.meaning_en: a metal container in which food or drink is preserved without air
meanings.example: a Coke can
meanings.example_cn: 可乐罐

meanings.meaning_en: a sweet food made from sugar
meanings.example: a box of candies
meanings.example_cn: 一盒糖果

meanings.example: You cannot have both together.
meanings.example_cn: 你不能二者兼得。

meanings.meaning_en: a covering that fits very closely to your head
meanings.example: a swimming cap
meanings.example_cn: 泳帽

meanings.meaning_en: an important city where the main government of a country, state etc is
meanings.example: Washington D.C., the capital of the United States
meanings.example_cn: 美国首都华盛顿特区

meanings.meaning_en: a vehicle with four wheels and an engine, that can carry a small number of passengers
meanings.example: Dan got out of the car and locked the door.
meanings.example_cn: 丹下了车，锁上车门。

meanings.meaning_cn: 停车场或车库，主要用于停放汽车
meanings.example: I turned the car into the car park.
meanings.example_cn: 我转弯把汽车开进了停车场。

meanings.meaning_en: a small piece of plastic or paper containing information about a person or showing, for example, that they belong to a particular organization, club etc
meanings.example: Employees must show their identity cards at the gate.
meanings.example_cn: 雇员在大门口必须出示自己的身份卡。

meanings.meaning_en: the series of jobs that a person has in a particular area of work, usually involving more responsibility as time passes
meanings.example: a teaching career
meanings.example_cn: 教学事业

meanings.meaning_en: giving a lot of attention to details
meanings.example: Any school trip requires careful planning.
meanings.example_cn: 学校的任何出游活动都需要周密的安排。

meanings.example: He folded the paper carefully.
meanings.example_cn: 他小心地把那张纸折起来。

meanings.meaning_en: heavy woven material for covering floors or stairs, or a piece of this material
meanings.example: My bedroom carpet is green.
meanings.example_cn: 我卧室里的地毯是绿色的。

meanings.meaning_en: a long pointed orange vegetable that grows under the ground
meanings.example: grated carrots
meanings.example_cn: 磨碎的胡萝卜

meanings.meaning_en: to have something with you in your pocket, on your belt, in your bag etc everywhere you go
meanings.example: All the soldiers carried rifles.
meanings.example_cn: 所有的士兵都背着步枪。

meanings.meaning_en: a short film that is made by photographing a series of drawings
meanings.example: cartoon characters such as Donald Duck
meanings.example_cn: 唐老鸭一类的卡通人物

meanings.meaning_en: a particular situation or a situation of a particular type
meanings.example: In some cases people have had to wait several weeks for an appointment.
meanings.example_cn: 在某些情况下，人们必须等上好几周才能得到约见。

meanings.meaning_en: money in the form of coins or notes rather than cheques,  credit card s  etc
meanings.example: Cash was taken during a burglary of the apartment.
meanings.example_cn: 在一次公寓盗窃案中现金被盗。

meanings.meaning_en: a very large strong building, built in the past as a safe place that could be easily defended against attack
meanings.example: Edinburgh Castle
meanings.example_cn: 爱丁堡城堡

meanings.meaning_en: a small animal with four legs that people often keep as a pet
meanings.example: The police played an elaborate game of cat and mouse to trap him.
meanings.example_cn: 警方跟他玩了一场精心布局的猫捉老鼠游戏，诱他落网。

meanings.meaning_en: to trap an animal or fish by using a trap, net, or hook, or by hunting it
meanings.example: Did you catch any fish?
meanings.example_cn: 你捕到鱼了吗？

meanings.meaning_cn: 光盘，激光唱片（compact disc）; 呼叫设备（calling device）; 中央地区（central district）; 商务部（Commerce Department）; 冷却时间（cool down time，游戏术语）; 创意总监（creative director）; 民防（civil defence）; 外交团（corps diplomatique）; 存单，存款单（certificate of deposit）; 坎德拉，新烛光（candela，发光强度单位）
meanings.example: She traded her posters for his CD.
meanings.example_cn: 她以海报换取他的光盘。

meanings.meaning_cn: CD 播放器; 激光唱机
meanings.example: You can connect the speakers to your CD player.
meanings.example_cn: 你可以将这些扬声器与你的激光唱机连接起来。

meanings.meaning_en: the inner surface of the top part of a room
meanings.example: rooms with high ceilings
meanings.example_cn: 天花板很高的房间

meanings.meaning_en: to show that an event or occasion is important by doing something special or enjoyable
meanings.example: It’s Dad’s birthday and we’re going out for a meal to celebrate.
meanings.example_cn: 今天是爸爸的生日，我们打算出去吃饭庆祝一下。

meanings.meaning_en: a famous living person
meanings.example: a sporting celebrity
meanings.example_cn: 体育明星

meanings.meaning_cn: 手机：一种便携式的通常无线的电话，用于在蜂窝系统中使用。
meanings.example: My cell phone beeped.
meanings.example_cn: 我的手机嘟嘟响了。

meanings.meaning_en: 1/100th of the standard unit of money in some countries. For example, there are 100 cents in one dollar or in one  euro  : symbol ¢.
meanings.example: A cup of rice which cost thirty cents a few weeks ago is now being sold for up to one dollar.
meanings.example_cn: 几周前价值30美分的1杯米如今卖到了1美元。

meanings.meaning_en: the middle of a space, area, or object, especially the exact middle
meanings.example: lines radiating out from the centre
meanings.example_cn: 从中心向外辐射的线条

meanings.meaning_en: to move something to a position at the centre of something else
meanings.example: chocolates with soft centres
meanings.example_cn: 软夹心巧克力

meanings.meaning_en: one of the 100-year periods measured from before or after the year of Christ’s birth
meanings.example: the story of life on a small farm at the turn of the century
meanings.example_cn: 讲述世纪初一个小农场生活的故事

meanings.meaning_en: a breakfast food made from grain and usually eaten with milk
meanings.example: a bowl of breakfast cereal
meanings.example_cn: 一碗早餐麦片

meanings.meaning_en: without doubt
meanings.example: They’re certainly not mine.
meanings.example_cn: “请给我来杯啤酒。”“好的，先生。”

meanings.meaning_en: a series of metal rings which are joined together in a line and used for fastening things, supporting weights, decoration etc
meanings.example: She had a gold chain around her neck.
meanings.example_cn: 她脖子上戴了条金项链。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of furniture for one person to sit on, which has a back, a seat, and four legs
meanings.example: a kitchen chair
meanings.example_cn: 厨房椅

meanings.meaning_en: the process or result of something or someone becoming different
meanings.example: I find it hard to cope with change.
meanings.example_cn: 我觉得很难适应变化。

meanings.meaning_en: an area of water that connects two larger areas of water
meanings.example: St George’s Channel
meanings.example_cn: 圣乔治海峡

meanings.meaning_en: the particular combination of qualities that makes someone a particular type of person
meanings.example: He has a cheerful but quiet character.
meanings.example_cn: 他的性格乐观文静。

meanings.meaning_en: an informal friendly conversation
meanings.example: She was enjoying their friendly little chat .
meanings.example_cn: 她很喜欢他们那种友好的闲聊。

meanings.example: Would you like to talk to me on the microphone, instead of typing in the chatroom?
meanings.example_cn: 你愿意用麦克风跟我讲话，而不是在聊天室里打字吗？

meanings.meaning_en: not at all expensive, or lower in price than you expected
meanings.example: cheap rail fares
meanings.example_cn: 便宜的火车票

meanings.meaning_en: to do something in order to find out whether something really is correct, true, or in good condition
meanings.example: Check the tiles carefully before you buy them.
meanings.example_cn: 购买之前要把瓷砖仔细检查一下。

meanings.meaning_en: the process of finding out if something is safe, correct, true, or in the condition it should be
meanings.example: A first rule in solving any mystery is to check the facts.
meanings.example_cn: 揭开谜团的第一条规则是核查事实。

meanings.meaning_en: a solid food made from milk, which is usually yellow or white in colour, and can be soft or hard
meanings.example: half a kilo of cheese
meanings.example_cn: 半公斤干酪

meanings.example: Michael is a professionally-trained chef.
meanings.example_cn: 迈克尔是受过职业培训的厨师。

meanings.example: Bruce graduated to chef at the Bear Hotel.
meanings.example_cn: 布鲁斯晋升为大熊酒店的厨师长。

meanings.example: Try this new dish, created by our head chef.
meanings.example_cn: 品尝一下这道新菜吧，是我们厨师长首创的。

meanings.meaning_en: a scientist who has special knowledge and training in chemistry
meanings.example: She worked as a research chemist.
meanings.example_cn: 她是一名化学研究员。

meanings.meaning_en: the science that is concerned with studying the structure of substances and the way that they change or combine with each other
meanings.example: inorganic/organic chemistry
meanings.example_cn: 无机 / 有机化学

meanings.meaning_en: a printed piece of paper that you write an amount of money on, sign, and use instead of money to pay for things
meanings.example: You could write her a cheque .
meanings.example_cn: 你可以给她开张支票。

meanings.meaning_en: a game for two players, who move their playing pieces according to particular rules across a special board to try to trap their opponent’s king
meanings.example: They meet fairly often to play chess .
meanings.example_cn: 他们经常在一起下国际象棋。

meanings.meaning_en: a common farm bird that is kept for its meat and eggs
meanings.example: Lionel built a coop so that they could raise chickens and have a supply of fresh eggs.
meanings.example_cn: 莱昂内尔搭建了一个鸡笼，这样他们就可以养鸡，得到新鲜鸡蛋。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is not yet an adult
meanings.example: The hotel is ideal for families with young children.
meanings.example_cn: 这家宾馆对带小孩的家庭再合适不过。

meanings.meaning_cn: 辣椒; 辣椒粉; （墨西哥）辣味肉末豆子
meanings.example: You can cook a cheap veggie chilli in 15 minutes.
meanings.example_cn: 你可以在15分钟内做出一道便宜的辣椒素菜。

meanings.meaning_cn: [食品]炸土豆条; 小木片; （作赌注用的）圆形筹码; 缺口（chip 的复数形式）
meanings.example: She ate a bag of chips.
meanings.example_cn: 她吃了一袋炸土豆条。

meanings.meaning_en: a sweet brown food that you can eat as a sweet or use in cooking to give foods such as cakes a special sweet taste
meanings.example: a chocolate bar
meanings.example_cn: 巧克力条

meanings.meaning_en: to decide which one of a number of things or people you want
meanings.example: It took us ages to choose a new carpet.
meanings.example_cn: 我们挑选新地毯花了很长时间。

meanings.meaning_en: a building in which films are shown
meanings.example: It’s on at the local cinema.
meanings.example_cn: 此片正在当地影院上映。

meanings.meaning_en: a completely round flat shape
meanings.example: Cut out two circles of paper.
meanings.example_cn: 剪出两个圆形纸片。

meanings.meaning_en: a group of people and animals who travel to different places performing skilful tricks as entertainment
meanings.example: Piccadilly Circus
meanings.example_cn: 皮卡迪利广场

meanings.meaning_en: a large important town
meanings.example: The nearest big city was St. Louis.
meanings.example_cn: 最近的大城市是圣路易斯。

meanings.meaning_cn: 城市中心：城市的主要或中心部分，是城市中高楼大厦、商店、办公室等聚集的地方。
meanings.example: Our offices are in the city centre.
meanings.example_cn: 我们的办公室位于市中心。

meanings.meaning_en: a group of students who are taught together
meanings.example: Gary came top of the class in English.
meanings.example_cn: 加里的英文是班里顶尖的。

meanings.example: Glows and grows in the murk of his brain.
meanings.example_cn: 在他阴暗沉郁的脑海里闪耀亮光。

meanings.example: Murk, dreariness in the hushed manor house; flies asleep on the ceiling.
meanings.example_cn: 沉寂的大宅里昏暗、沉闷，苍蝇都在天花板上睡着了。

meanings.example: Some teachers went to school to support students who had chosen to brave the murk and attend class.
meanings.example_cn: 一些老师依旧去学校为不顾雾霾困扰勇敢来上学的学生们上课。

meanings.meaning_en: belonging to a traditional style or set of ideas
meanings.example: the classical theory of relativity
meanings.example_cn: 经典相对论

meanings.meaning_en: a member of the same class in a school, college or – in the US – a university
meanings.example: He acquainted his classmate with my sister.
meanings.example_cn: 他把我妹妹介绍给他的同班同学。

meanings.meaning_en: a room that you have lessons in at a school or college
meanings.example: The boy bounced out of the classroom.
meanings.example_cn: 那男孩突然从教室里奔出去。

meanings.meaning_en: without any dirt, marks etc
meanings.example: Are your hands clean?
meanings.example_cn: 你的手干净吗？

meanings.meaning_en: someone whose job is to clean other people’s houses, offices etc
meanings.example: a vacuum cleaner
meanings.example_cn: 真空吸尘器

meanings.meaning_en: expressed in a simple and direct way so that people understand
meanings.example: clear instructions
meanings.example_cn: 明确的指示

meanings.meaning_en: to make somewhere emptier or tidier by removing things from it
meanings.example: The question wasn’t very clear.
meanings.example_cn: 这问题不是很清楚。

meanings.meaning_en: in a way that is easy to see, hear, or understand
meanings.example: Please speak clearly.
meanings.example_cn: 请说得清楚点。

meanings.meaning_en: able to learn and understand things quickly
meanings.example: a clever man
meanings.example_cn: 聪明的人

meanings.meaning_en: to make a short hard sound, or make something produce this sound
meanings.example: The door clicked shut behind me.
meanings.example_cn: 门在我身后咔嗒一声关上了。

meanings.meaning_en: to move up, down, or across something using your feet and hands, especially when this is difficult to do
meanings.example: Harry climbed the stairs.
meanings.example_cn: 哈里爬上楼梯。

meanings.example: I prefer walking to climbing.
meanings.example_cn: 我喜欢散步多于喜欢爬山。

meanings.meaning_cn: （植物）攀缘的; 和登山、攀岩运动有关的
meanings.example: He mimed climbing a mountain.
meanings.example_cn: 他用哑剧形式表示爬山。

meanings.meaning_cn: 攀登，攀爬; 升高; 升值（climb 的现在分词形式）
meanings.example: Climbing so high made me feel dizzy.
meanings.example_cn: 爬那么高使我感到头晕目眩。

meanings.meaning_en: an instrument that shows what time it is, in a room or outside on a building
meanings.example: I heard the clock strike six (= make six loud sounds ) .
meanings.example_cn: 我听到钟敲了六下。

meanings.meaning_en: to shut something in order to cover an opening, or to become shut in this way
meanings.example: Would you mind if I closed the window?
meanings.example_cn: 我把窗户关上你不介意吧？

meanings.meaning_cn: 几乎，差不多：表示接近某个数量或程度。
meanings.example: She is very close to her father.
meanings.example_cn: 她和父亲的关系很亲密。

meanings.meaning_cn: 从近处，近距离：表示从短距离观察或接触。
meanings.example: She sounded close to tears.
meanings.example_cn: 她听起来就要哭了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 关着的，闭合的; 闭关自守的，不愿接受新思想的; （部件、成员或答案的数量）有限定的，固定的; （商家）（尤指短时间）歇业的; （数）（集合）封闭的; （数）（集合）包含所有极限值的; （曲线，图形）闭合的; 不公开的，保密的; 形成完整环形的，封闭的; 结束的，不再继续的
meanings.example: Her eyes were tightly closed.
meanings.example_cn: 她的双眼紧闭着。

meanings.meaning_cn: 关，闭; 结束，终止; 封锁，封闭（close 的过去式和过去分词）
meanings.example: He closed his eyes wearily.
meanings.example_cn: 他疲惫地闭上了眼睛。

meanings.meaning_en: a cupboard built into the wall of a room from the floor to the ceiling
meanings.example: a closet full of beautiful clothes
meanings.example_cn: 满是漂亮衣服的壁橱

meanings.meaning_en: the things that people wear to cover their body or keep warm
meanings.example: What sort of clothes was he wearing?
meanings.example_cn: 他穿着什么样的衣服？

meanings.meaning_en: a cloudy sky, day etc is dark because there are a lot of clouds
meanings.example: a cloudy night with some light rain
meanings.example_cn: 伴有些许小雨的多云的夜晚

meanings.meaning_en: someone who wears funny clothes, a red nose, bright make-up on their face etc, and does silly things to make people laugh, especially at a circus
meanings.example: The performance of the clown kept the public rolling about.
meanings.example_cn: 小丑的表演使观众笑得前仰后合。

meanings.meaning_cn: 〔职业体育的〕俱乐部；俱乐部；夜总会
meanings.meaning_en: a professional organization including the players, managers, and owners of a sports team
meanings.example: Manchester United Football Club
meanings.example_cn: 曼联（队）足球俱乐部

meanings.meaning_en: a bus with comfortable seats used for long journeys
meanings.example: a coach trip to Scotland
meanings.example_cn: 去苏格兰的长途公共汽车之行

meanings.meaning_en: the area where the land meets the sea
meanings.example: We drove along the Pacific coast to Seattle.
meanings.example_cn: 我们沿着太平洋海岸驾车前往西雅图。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of clothing with long sleeves that is worn over your clothes to protect them or to keep you warm
meanings.example: Billy! Put your coat on , it’s cold outside!
meanings.example_cn: 比利！穿上外套，外面很冷！

meanings.meaning_en: a hot dark brown drink that has a slightly bitter taste
meanings.example: Do you want a cup of coffee?
meanings.example_cn: 你要来杯咖啡吗？

meanings.meaning_cn: 可乐饮料，一杯可乐; 可乐果树
meanings.example: Eleanor bought him a Coca-Cola.
meanings.example_cn: 埃莉诺给他买了瓶可口可乐。

meanings.example: He bought a Hershey Bar and a bottle of Coca-Cola.
meanings.example_cn: 他买了一块“好时”巧克力和一瓶可口可乐。

meanings.meaning_en: something that is cold has a low temperature
meanings.example: She splashed her face with cold water.
meanings.example_cn: 她往脸上泼冷水。

meanings.meaning_en: a low temperature or cold weather
meanings.example: a blast of cold air
meanings.example_cn: 一股冷空气

meanings.meaning_en: someone you work with – used especially by professional people
meanings.example: a colleague of mine from the bank
meanings.example_cn: 我在银行的一位同事

meanings.meaning_en: to get things of the same type from different places and bring them together
meanings.example: After 25 years of collecting recipes, she has compiled them into a cookbook.
meanings.example_cn: 她搜集了25年食谱，把它们编成一本烹饪书。

meanings.meaning_en: a school for advanced education, especially in a particular profession or skill
meanings.example: a teacher training college
meanings.example_cn: 师范学院

meanings.meaning_cn: <英>颜色; 色彩，用色，配色; 颜料，染料; 红润的面色，血色，气色; （人种的）肤色，有色人种; （代表团队、国家、船等的）旗帜，徽章; （代表国家、球队、政党等的）标志色; （照片、电视图像等的）彩色; 趣味，风格，情调; （物理）色; （纹章采用的）传统色（如红、绿、黑、青、紫）; （喻） （音色、音质、音调或音乐表现形式的）多样性; （喻） 含义的细微差别; （斯诺克）除白色主球和红球外的任何球
meanings.example: Leaves change colour in autumn.
meanings.example_cn: 树叶在秋天改变颜色。

meanings.meaning_cn: 给……染色; （用记号笔、蜡笔、彩色铅笔等）涂色，着色; 变色; （使）脸红; （尤指负面地）影响; （喻）使生动，使鲜明; （喻）使（某人的嗓音）充满（某种感情）; 扭曲，渲染
meanings.example: What's your favourite colour?
meanings.example_cn: 你最喜欢的颜色是什么？

meanings.example: Do you dream in colour ?
meanings.example_cn: 你的梦是彩色的吗？

meanings.meaning_en: a flat piece of plastic, metal etc with a row of thin teeth on one side, used for making your hair tidy
meanings.example: Your hair needs a good comb.
meanings.example_cn: 你的头发需要好好梳理一下。

meanings.meaning_en: to make hair look tidy using a comb
meanings.example: Melanie ran upstairs to comb her hair.
meanings.example_cn: 梅拉妮跑上楼去梳头发。

meanings.meaning_en: to move towards you or arrive at the place where you are
meanings.example: Let me know when they come.
meanings.example_cn: 他们来了就告诉我。

meanings.meaning_cn: 返回：回到之前的位置、状态或活动中。
meanings.example: "Come back!" he called after me.
meanings.example_cn: “回来！”他在我身后冲我喊。

meanings.meaning_cn: 复苏：恢复到之前的状态或健康状况。
meanings.example: 'He'll come back,' Susan assured her.
meanings.example_cn: “他会回来的。”苏珊安慰她道。

meanings.meaning_cn: 重现：重新出现或再次发生。
meanings.example: She's going to come back every so often.
meanings.example_cn: 她会偶尔回来一下。

meanings.example: "Come back!" he called after me.
meanings.example_cn: “回来！”他在我身后冲我喊。

meanings.meaning_cn: 重返：返回某个地方或某人身边。
meanings.example: "Come back!" he called after me.
meanings.example_cn: “回来！”他在我身后冲我喊。

meanings.meaning_en: entertainment that is intended to make people laugh
meanings.example: a career in stand-up comedy
meanings.example_cn: 单口喜剧表演职业

meanings.meaning_en: making you feel physically relaxed, without any pain or without being too hot, cold etc
meanings.example: The bed wasn’t particularly comfortable.
meanings.example_cn: 这床不大舒服。

meanings.meaning_en: someone whose job is to tell jokes and make people laugh
meanings.example: a stand-up comic
meanings.example_cn: 单口喜剧演员

meanings.meaning_en: amusing you and making you want to laugh
a business organization that makes or sells goods or services
meanings.example: Which company do you work for?
meanings.example_cn: 你在哪家公司上班？

meanings.meaning_en: a situation in which people or organizations try to be more successful than other people or organizations
meanings.example: Competition for the job was intense.
meanings.example_cn: 该职位竞争很激烈。

meanings.meaning_en: including all parts, details, facts etc and with nothing missing
meanings.example: a complete set of china
meanings.example_cn: 一整套瓷器

meanings.meaning_en: an electronic machine that stores information and uses programs to help you find, organize, or change the information
meanings.example: a huge global computer network
meanings.example_cn: 巨大的全球计算机网络

meanings.meaning_en: a performance given by musicians or singers
meanings.example: a rock concert
meanings.example_cn: 摇滚音乐会

meanings.meaning_en: to communicate with sb, for example by telephone or letter
meanings.example: Contact the Women's Alliance for further details.
meanings.example_cn: 请联系妇女联合会获取详情。

meanings.meaning_en: to not stop happening, existing, or doing something
meanings.example: He will be continuing his education in the US.
meanings.example_cn: 他将在美国继续求学。

meanings.meaning_en: an informal talk in which people exchange news, feelings, and thoughts
meanings.example: a telephone conversation
meanings.example_cn: 电话交谈

meanings.meaning_en: to prepare food for eating by using heat
meanings.example: Where did you learn to cook?
meanings.example_cn: 你在哪里学烹调的？

meanings.meaning_cn: <英>炊具，锅，厨灶; <英，非正式>适宜煮食而不宜生吃的水果（尤指某种苹果）
meanings.example: The pressure cooker is very useful for people who go out all day.
meanings.example_cn: 压力锅对整天外出的人非常有用。

meanings.meaning_cn: 曲奇饼，小甜饼; ……样的人; （浏览网页后存储在计算机的）缓存文件; <苏格兰>淡面包; 漂亮的年轻女子
meanings.example: Heart-shaped cookie cutters come in many sizes.
meanings.example_cn: 有多种不同大小的心形饼干模具。

meanings.example: I find cooking very relaxing.
meanings.example_cn: 我发现烹饪非常令人放松。

meanings.example: My husband does all the cooking.
meanings.example_cn: 我丈夫把做饭全包了下来。

meanings.meaning_cn: 煮，烧; 烹饪，烹调; <非正式>发生，计划中（cook 的现在分词形式）
meanings.example: She praised his cooking.
meanings.example_cn: 她称赞他的烹调技术。

meanings.meaning_en: low in temperature, but not cold, often in a way that feels pleasant
meanings.example: She swam out into the cool water.
meanings.example_cn: 她往外游向清凉的水里。

meanings.meaning_en: something that is made to be exactly like another thing
meanings.example: back-up copies of your files
meanings.example_cn: 你的文档的备份

meanings.meaning_en: to deliberately make or produce something that is exactly like another thing
meanings.example: Could you copy this letter and send it out, please?
meanings.example_cn: 你能把这封信复印一份发出去吗？

meanings.meaning_en: the point at which two lines or edges meet
meanings.example: He pulled a dirty handkerchief out by its corner and waved it at me.
meanings.example_cn: 他拽出一块脏手帕，捏着一角向我挥动。

meanings.meaning_en: having no mistakes
meanings.example: If my calculations are correct, we’re about ten miles from Exeter.
meanings.example_cn: 如果我计算得没错的话，我们离埃克塞特大约十英里。

meanings.meaning_en: to make something right or to make it work the way it should
meanings.example: Score one point for each correct answer .
meanings.example_cn: 答对一题得一分。

meanings.meaning_en: the amount of money that you have to pay in order to buy, do, or produce something
meanings.example: I offered to pay the cost of the taxi.
meanings.example_cn: 我提出支付出租车费。

meanings.meaning_en: a set of clothes worn by an actor or by someone to make them look like something such as an animal, famous person etc
meanings.example: the film’s lavish costumes and spectacular sets
meanings.example_cn: 影片中奢华的戏装和壮观的场景

meanings.meaning_en: used as the past tense of ‘can’ to say what someone was able to do or was allowed to do in the past
meanings.example: By the time she was eight, she could read Greek and Latin.
meanings.example_cn: 她八岁时就会读希腊文和拉丁文了。

meanings.meaning_en: an area of land that is controlled by its own government, president, king etc
meanings.example: the Scandinavian countries
meanings.example_cn: 斯堪的纳维亚国家

meanings.meaning_en: land that is outside cities and towns
meanings.example: The house had lovely views over open countryside .
meanings.example_cn: 这房子望出去是开阔的乡村美景。

meanings.meaning_en: a series of lessons in a particular subject
meanings.example: Andy’s doing a one-year journalism course.
meanings.example_cn: 安迪正在修读为期一年的新闻课程。

meanings.meaning_en: the place where a trial is held, or the people there, especially the judge and the jury who examine the evidence and decide whether someone is guilty or not guilty
meanings.example: It could not be proved in a court of law.
meanings.example_cn: 这无法在法庭上证实。

meanings.meaning_en: the child of your uncle or aunt
meanings.example: My cousin Mark helped me to bring in the bags.
meanings.example_cn: 我表弟马克帮我把包提了进来。

meanings.meaning_en: to lie or spread over the surface of sth
meanings.example: Much of the country is covered by snow.
meanings.example_cn: 这个国家的大部分地区都被白雪覆盖。

meanings.meaning_en: a thing that is put over or on another thing, usually to protect it or to decorate it
meanings.example: a course covering business law
meanings.example_cn: 一门包括商业法的课程

meanings.meaning_en: a large female animal that is kept on farms and used to produce milk or meat
meanings.example: He kept a few dairy cows.
meanings.example_cn: 他养了几头奶牛。

meanings.meaning_en: a thick yellow-white liquid that rises to the top of milk
meanings.example: fresh cream
meanings.example_cn: 鲜奶油

meanings.meaning_en: anything that is living, such as an animal, fish, or insect, but not a plant
meanings.example: all the living creatures in the sea
meanings.example_cn: 海洋中所有的生物

meanings.meaning_cn: 信用卡：一种授权信用购买的卡片。
meanings.example: She was charged with credit card fraud.
meanings.example_cn: 她被控告信用卡欺骗罪。

meanings.meaning_en: a game between two teams of 11 players in which players try to get points by hitting a ball and running between two sets of three sticks
meanings.example: The boy traded his knife for a cricket bat.
meanings.example_cn: 那男孩用他的刀子换了一个板球棒。

meanings.meaning_en: a large  reptile  with a long mouth and many sharp teeth that lives in lakes and rivers in hot wet parts of the world
meanings.example: a crocodile briefcase
meanings.example_cn: 鳄鱼皮公文包

meanings.meaning_en: to go across; to pass or stretch from one side to the other
meanings.example: He raised his arms in triumph as he crossed the line for his 100-metres win.
meanings.example_cn: 他以胜利的姿态高举双手跑过终点线，赢得了这场百米赛。

meanings.meaning_en: a place where two lines, roads, tracks etc cross
meanings.example: Turn left at the first crossing.
meanings.example_cn: 在第一个十字路口左转。

meanings.meaning_en: a large group of people who have gathered together to do something, for example to watch something or protest about something
meanings.example: A vast crowd gathered in the main square.
meanings.example_cn: 主广场上聚集了一大群人。

meanings.example: It's always crowded at peak times.
meanings.example_cn: 在高峰期总是很拥挤。

meanings.meaning_cn: 聚集，群集; 挤满，塞满; 靠近，盯着（crowd 的过去式和过去分词形式）
meanings.example: London was very crowded.
meanings.example_cn: 伦敦拥挤不堪。

meanings.meaning_en: to produce tears from your eyes, usually because you are unhappy or hurt
meanings.example: Don’t cry, Laura. It’ll be OK.
meanings.example_cn: 不要哭，劳拉，没事的。

meanings.meaning_en: a small round container, usually with a handle, that you use to drink tea, coffee etc
meanings.example: Mathew picked up the cup and sipped his coffee.
meanings.example_cn: 马修拿起杯子抿了口咖啡。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of furniture with doors, and sometimes shelves, used for storing clothes, plates, food etc
meanings.example: It’s in the kitchen cupboard.
meanings.example_cn: 它在厨房的碗柜里。

meanings.meaning_cn: 用咖喱烧，给…加咖喱粉；梳刷；鞭打
meanings.meaning_en: to prepare (food) with curry powder or sauce
meanings.example: chicken curry
meanings.example_cn: 咖喱鸡

meanings.meaning_en: a type of food from India, consisting of meat or vegetables in a spicy sauce
a piece of hanging cloth that can be pulled across to cover a window, divide a room etc
meanings.example: red velvet curtains
meanings.example_cn: 红色的丝绒窗帘

meanings.meaning_en: someone who buys goods or services from a shop, company etc
meanings.example: We aim to offer good value and service to all our customers.
meanings.example_cn: 我们力求为所有的客户提供物有所值的商品和服务。

meanings.meaning_en: to divide something or separate something from its main part, using scissors, a knife etc
meanings.example: Do you want me to cut the cake?
meanings.example_cn: 要我切蛋糕吗？

meanings.meaning_en: a number of related events that happen again and again in the same order
meanings.example: a woman’s menstrual cycle
meanings.example_cn: 女性的月经周期

meanings.example: Cycling is a cheap way to get around.
meanings.example_cn: 骑自行车是一种省钱的旅游方式。

meanings.example: Hi, Dad—can you put Nicky on?
meanings.example_cn: 您好，爸爸。您让尼基接电话好吗？

meanings.example: Dad went out to milk the cows.
meanings.example_cn: 爸爸出去给牛挤奶去了。

meanings.meaning_en: happening or done every day
meanings.example: daily flights to Miami
meanings.example_cn: 每日飞往迈阿密的航班

meanings.meaning_en: a newspaper that is printed and sold every day, or every day except Sunday
meanings.example: China Daily receives dispatches from all parts of the world.
meanings.example_cn: 《中国日报》收到世界各地发来的电讯。

meanings.meaning_en: to move your body to the sound and rhythm of music
meanings.example: Come on, let’s dance.
meanings.example_cn: 来吧，我们跳舞吧。

meanings.meaning_en: a special set of movements performed to a particular type of music
meanings.example: The words danced before her tired eyes.
meanings.example_cn: 这些字在她疲乏的眼前晃动。

meanings.meaning_cn: 舞蹈家; 舞蹈演员; 舞女; 跳舞者
meanings.example: He's a dancer with the Royal Ballet.
meanings.example_cn: 他是皇家芭蕾舞团的舞蹈演员。

meanings.example: She'd been a dancer with a modern dance company in New York.
meanings.example_cn: 她过去一直是纽约一家现代舞公司的舞蹈演员。

meanings.example: Let's go dancing tonight.
meanings.example_cn: 我们今晚去跳舞吧。

meanings.meaning_cn: 跳舞; 跳跃，雀跃; （某物）摆动，摇晃（dance 的现在分词）
meanings.example: I love to go out dancing.
meanings.example_cn: 我喜欢出去跳舞。

meanings.meaning_en: the possibility that someone or something will be harmed, destroyed, or killed
meanings.example: Danger! No boats beyond this point.
meanings.example_cn: 危险！船只不可越过此处。

meanings.meaning_en: able or likely to harm or kill you
meanings.example: laws about dangerous dogs
meanings.example_cn: 有关危险犬类的法律

meanings.meaning_en: with no or very little light, especially because it is night
meanings.example: The church was dark and quiet.
meanings.example_cn: 教堂里黑魆魆的，寂静无声。

meanings.meaning_en: a particular day of the month or year, especially shown by a number
meanings.example: The date on the letter was 30th August 1962.
meanings.example_cn: 信上的日期是1962年8月30日。

meanings.meaning_en: to write or print the date on something
meanings.example: What’s today’s date?
meanings.example_cn: 今天几号？

meanings.meaning_en: someone’s female child
meanings.example: She’s got two daughters and one son.
meanings.example_cn: 她有两个女儿和一个儿子。

meanings.meaning_en: a period of 24 hours
meanings.example: We spent three days in Paris.
meanings.example_cn: 我们在巴黎度过了三天。

meanings.meaning_en: no longer alive
meanings.example: Her mother had been dead for ten years.
meanings.example_cn: 她母亲去世十年了。

meanings.meaning_en: used before someone’s name or title to begin a letter
meanings.example: Dear Sir or Madam, ...
meanings.example_cn: 尊敬的先生或女士，…

meanings.meaning_en: used to show that you are surprised, upset, or annoyed because something bad has happened
meanings.example: Dear Mrs. Wilson, ...
meanings.example_cn: 尊敬的威尔逊夫人，…

meanings.meaning_en: to make a choice or judgment about something, especially after considering all the possibilities or arguments
meanings.example: Has anything been decided yet?
meanings.example_cn: 已经作出什么决定了吗？
