meanings.meaning_cn: 更坏，更差，更糟; 更糟的是，更倒霉的是
meanings.example: The situation got steadily worse.
meanings.example_cn: 局势逐渐恶化。

meanings.meaning_cn: 更糟的事，更恶劣的情况
meanings.example: Oh well, it could be worse.
meanings.example_cn: 哎，算了，情况本可能会更糟的。

meanings.meaning_en: worse than anything or anyone else
meanings.example: This is the worst recession for fifty years.
meanings.example_cn: 这是50年来最严重的一次经济衰退。

meanings.meaning_en: most badly
meanings.example: My worst fear was that we would run out of food.
meanings.example_cn: 我最大的担忧是我们会把食物吃光。

meanings.meaning_cn: 将，将会（will 的过去式，用于转述）; 会......（用于提出意见或征求建议时）; 会，就（表示预期或设想）; 会（表示不曾发生或不可能存在的事）; 才会，就会（说明动机）; 想（表示某人想要某物或想做某事）; 就（不），偏（不）; 请…...好吗？（表示客气地请求别人做某事）; 要不要…...？; 过去老是，过去常常; 总是，爱（带出一贯的行为）; <文>但愿…...（表示强烈的愿望）; 也许，大概（表示推测或希望）; 肯定，应该（表示有充分理由猜测是某种情况）
meanings.example: I would reject that contention.
meanings.example_cn: 我不会同意那种观点。

meanings.meaning_cn: <非正式>（表示极大的惊奇或钦佩）哇，呀
meanings.example: Wow! That's totally awesome!
meanings.example_cn: 哇！真是棒极了！

meanings.meaning_cn: <非正式> 使叫绝，博得（某人的）称赞
meanings.example: Wow, man! That's totally gnarly!
meanings.example_cn: 哇，老兄，那真是太好了！

meanings.meaning_cn: <非正式> 极大的成功，一鸣惊人之举; 音符失真，声音走音
meanings.example: I thought, "Wow, what a good idea."
meanings.example_cn: 我想: “哇，多妙的一个主意。”

meanings.meaning_cn: 写作，编写; 写道; 写信; 书写，写字; 谱写（音乐作品）; 编写（计算机程序）; 将（计算机中的）数据写入（磁盘或其他储存媒体）; 填写（表格、支票等），拟定; （笔）能写字; 拼写; <加，南非>参加（笔试）; 书写，手写（与铅印相对）; 以写作为生; 承保（保险单）
meanings.example: Write me while you're away.
meanings.example_cn: 你外出期间给我写信。

meanings.meaning_cn: 记录在书面形式中：将信息以书面形式记录下来。
meanings.example: Write down (in order of priority) the qualities you'd like to have.
meanings.example_cn: （按先后顺序）写下你所希望拥有的品质。

meanings.meaning_cn: 贬低，诋毁：通过书写方式贬低、诋毁或伤害。
meanings.example: Write down the sort of thing you would like to do, given the opportunity.
meanings.example_cn: 如果有机会，请写下你想做的那类事。

meanings.meaning_cn: 降低，贬值：降低某物的地位、等级或价值; 尤指降低账面价值。
meanings.example: Find someone who will let you talk things through, or failing that, write down your thoughts.
meanings.example_cn: 找个能让你畅所欲言的人，如果不能的话，就把你的想法写下来。

meanings.meaning_cn: 降低品味、理解力或智力水平：通过书写方式降低品味、理解力或智力水平。
meanings.example: Write down (in order of priority) the qualities you'd like to have.
meanings.example_cn: （按先后顺序）写下你所希望拥有的品质。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who writes books, stories etc, especially as a job
meanings.example: She’s one of my favourite writers.
meanings.example_cn: 她是我最喜欢的作家之一。

meanings.meaning_en: books, poems, articles etc, especially those by a particular writer or about a particular subject
meanings.example: Some of his most powerful writing is based on his childhood experiences.
meanings.example_cn: 他的一些最震慑人心的作品是根据儿时经历写成的。

meanings.example: I calculate he is wrong in saying that.
meanings.example_cn: 我认为他说的那句话是错误的。

meanings.meaning_cn: 年，日历年; 年，一年时间; 与某事相关的一年，年度; 学年; 年级，某年纪的学生; 年龄，年纪，岁; 很久，好长时间; 年代，时代; 年级，某年级的学生
meanings.example: They separated last year.
meanings.example_cn: 他们于去年分居了。

meanings.meaning_en: the colour of butter or the middle part of an egg
meanings.example: Yellow doesn’t suit me at all.
meanings.example_cn: 黄色一点都不适合我。

meanings.example: Yes, there's plenty of room.
meanings.example_cn: 是的，还很空呢。

meanings.example: Yes, officer, I saw what happened.
meanings.example_cn: 是，警察先生，我看到了发生的事。

meanings.meaning_cn: 在昨天; 日前，不久前
meanings.example: Patrick emailed me yesterday.
meanings.example_cn: 帕特里克昨天给我发电邮了。

meanings.example: We were expecting him yesterday.
meanings.example_cn: 我们昨天一直在等他。

meanings.meaning_en: used to emphasize how much time will pass before something happens, or how long a situation will continue
meanings.example: ‘When’s your holiday?’ ‘Oh, not for ages yet.’
meanings.example_cn: “你什么时候去休假？”“噢，不知何年何月呢。”

meanings.meaning_en: used to introduce a fact, situation, or quality that is surprising after what you have just said
meanings.example: It could be months yet before they know their fate.
meanings.example_cn: 可能要好几个月他们才能知道自己的命运。

meanings.meaning_en: used to refer to a person or group of people when speaking or writing to them
meanings.example: Hi, Kelly. How are you?
meanings.example_cn: 嗨，凯利，你好吗？

meanings.meaning_cn: 幼小的，年轻的; 存在不久的，新成立的; （显得）年轻的，（显得）岁数不大的; 适合年轻人的; 由年轻人（或儿童）构成的，青少年的，平均年龄小的; 夭折的，早逝的
meanings.example: He's a brilliant young scientist.
meanings.example_cn: 他是一个才华横溢的青年科学家。

meanings.meaning_cn: 年轻人（the young）; 幼崽，雏鸟
meanings.example: Her grandchildren keep her young.
meanings.example_cn: 她的孙子孙女让她保持年轻。

meanings.meaning_cn: 【名】 （Young）（英、葡）扬，（柬）永，（中）杨，（广东话）威妥玛（人名）
meanings.example: She is an articulate young woman.
meanings.example_cn: 她是个善表达的年轻女子。

meanings.example: You should keep in with your colleagues.
meanings.example_cn: 你应当与你的同事友好相处。

meanings.example: You're driving yourself too hard.
meanings.example_cn: 你把自己弄得太累了。

meanings.meaning_en: an animal that looks like a horse but has black and white lines all over its body
meanings.example: The neck of the zebra was nipped by a lion.
meanings.example_cn: 狮子咬断了那头斑马的脖子。

meanings.meaning_en: the number 0
meanings.example: Make x greater than or equal to zero.
meanings.example_cn: 设x大于或等于零。

meanings.meaning_en: a place, usually in a city, where animals of many kinds are kept so that people can go to look at them
meanings.example: The road to the zoo turns off here.
meanings.example_cn: 通向动物园的路由这儿拐弯。
